text.title: Async Standup Output Contract
text.summary: Schemas for the daily standup post and the weekly digest. Posts must match the post schema; digests must match the digest schema.

field.name: post.author_local_window_match
field.notes: true if posted_at is within 2h of working-day-start OR 1h of previous-day-end in author's local tz

forbidden.pattern: post.blocker contains text but post.blocker_owner_mention is null
post fields with literal placeholders ("TBD", "WIP", "TODO") — must be concrete sentences
post longer than 250 words total — standup is not a journal
digest authored by the same contributor whose work it summarizes (must be PM or independent summarizer)
digest invented entries not traceable to a specific daily post (require post_id citations on each bullet)
post.yesterday and post.today identical (signal of copy-paste / disengagement; must explicitly say "continuing same task" if true)

allowed-transformations.transformation: AI may draft a post from the contributor's daily commit log + calendar; the contributor must edit and sign before submit.
AI may produce the digest from raw thread content; PM must edit and sign before publishing.
Auto-translate posts to the team's working language if the contributor wrote in their native one (preserve original below the translation).

list.item: Three labeled fields present in order (Yesterday/Today/Blocker)
Blocker field is either "none" or has an @-owner mention
Posted within author's local window OR explicitly flagged late
Digest cites post_ids for each bullet
Digest produced by PM or summarizer, not the worker being summarized
